problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
